title: ornithogalum neurostegium subsp. eigii
intro: Ornithogalum neurostegium subsp. eigii is a plant species belonging to the Asparagaceae family, commonly known as the star-of-Bethlehem or Ornithogalum. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or inflosum in order to utilize its medicinal properties.
